entries.text:
A thrusting sword with an intricately engraved silver handle. The coloring is nicely subdued after years of attentive care.
When sheathed, the sword serves as a cane to ease a traveler's burden, like a companion who shares the trials encountered when traversing great distances.
Graduates of the school all follow a similar path, readying themselves to be vessels to newfound knowledge.

A strike weapon forged with black iron to conceal blood stains. The religious motif has been worn down by repeated bludgeoning.
Originally a ceremonial tool meant for use upon the sacred dead to lay them in their coffins, but now the owner wields her hammer against the living, whom she prays will avoid a similar torment and rest in eternal peace.
